January: 3-strike head to head knockout
February: MatchPlay with multi MatchPlay finals
March: Fair Strikes
April: 3-strike head to head knockout
May: MatchPlay with multi MatchPlay finals
June: Fair Strikes

Wednesday July 2, 2025

Tournament Starts 6:30 PM
2.5 Hours of Max Match Play
Top 4 Ladder Final - Top 4 Trophies

This is at a private collection in Kimberly, WI. Please register by sending Rachel an email at ladiesflipwi@gmail.com.

All rulings are subject to the discretion of the tournament director. Extra balls are played one-handed. If there is a tie for final four, we do a full game tiebreaker. Holler with any questions or concerns!

tournaments.tournament_name: Stern Army Women's Tournament at GameCraft
tournaments.details:
Join us for our July Stern Army event at GameCraft Arcade!

This will be a 3 strike knockout. Prizes will be awarded to the top 3 players. 
Registration will start at 5:30 PM and the tournament will starts promptly at 6:30. Feel free to come early for practice and to grab some of GameCraft's beverage offerings - they open at 4 PM. Feel free to bring food. Venue is 21+.
$10 entry (cash  only - includes IFPA fee and prizes) plus tokens.
32 player limit.

This is another opportunity to qualify for women’s division points for the IFPA Women’s State Championships to be held in January 2026.

All skill levels welcome- including those new to tournament play or pinball in general.
Welcome to all cis & trans women & non-binary players comfortable in a women-centered experience.

Friends, family, and casual players are encouraged to attend and may play any games not actively being used in the tournament- please be respectful of tournament players and everyone's space!

St Charles, Missouri

July 4th, 2025

= 120% TGP* =

tournaments.tournament_name: Red, White, and Boos: Women’s Pinball Bash!
tournaments.details:
This is an all-day pinball tournament for women and non-binary folks at a private residence in Richmond, VA, and PRE-REGISTRATION IS REQUIRED. Address will be disclosed at registration. 

Tournament Date: 7/5/25, warmups at 11:00 AM, player meeting 11:45, tournament start 12:00. 

This event has a cap of 28 players and requires pre-registration. Registration opens on 5/17/25 at 12:00PM ET (noon). AT THAT TIME, Please send an email with your full name, IFPA number, and confirmation that you will attend and pay the $20 tournament fee. Send to bellesandchimesrva@gmail.com no sooner than 5/17/25 at 12:00PM ET. Emails received prior to the date and time above will not be acknowledged, nor will emails sent to any other email address I may have. 

Format: 12 rounds of Matchplay in 4 player groups. 8 players to finals. Finals will be group elimination with PAPA scoring. There may be side tournaments for prizes. There will be trophies. 100% of all tournament fees less the $28 IFPA fees and trophy expenses will be paid to the top 4: 40/30/20/10%.

Games: (11) Baywatch, Jaws Premium, Fathom Revisited, Frontier, Skateball, Jurassic Park Premium, Godzilla Premium, Nine Ball, Meteor, Firepower, Radical

Fun Stuff: BYOB and a cooler, a side dish, and a camp chair for outdoor hangs (my house is not large, you will mostly be outside between rounds socializing). I don’t have a grill, but I will air fry a fuckload of hotdogs and veggie dogs and provide buns and fixins’ ! I’m lookin for donations of sides like potato salad, coleslaw, cookies etc! I’ll also have a ton of bomb pops to keep you cool. Honestly just bring whatever. Sunscreen is probably a good idea. 

I have cats so if you’re allergic, don’t forget to take your meds!

tournaments.tournament_name: B&C Jax - Stern Army Kong Launch Party
tournaments.details:
Come join us for our Ladies KONG Launch Party at Leaderboard Arcade - Shad Road location!
All ages and skill levels are welcome!

Registration & Practice: 11:00 am - 12:00 pm
Tournament Start Time: 12:00 pm

Cost: $10 buy-in. Players must also purchase a Retro game card to play the machines. There are 2 options: $30 to play all day, which includes the $10 buy-in and Retro game card (best deal) OR pay per credit.

Format:
- Qualifying:
Group Match Play with 2 games per round. Scoring: 5-3-2-1. Swiss pairing. Qualifying will last until approximately 5pm. The top 4 ladies will move on to the finals. If there are at least 16 participants, the top 8 will move on to the finals.

- Finals: Group Match Play Elimination with 3 games per round. The 3rd game will be played on Kong. The scoring will be 7-5-3-1.

- If we do not have 8 participants, the format will be at least 13 rounds of Match Play with no finals. Rounds will extend beyond 5pm. Scoring will be the same.

Prizes:
- Kong Grand Champion plaque to the tournament winner
- Trophies for the top 4
- Prizes/Swag to be raffled off
- IFPA points for all

Ladies, Get Ready to Rule the Jungle!

Tournament Details:

5 rounds of match play followed by finals.

Our Women's Bi-Monthly tournaments always take place on the 1st and 3rd Monday of each month (unless there is a holiday).  Please check out Facebook page for cancellations, rescheduled tournaments, etc.

2121 N Monroe St.

(located inside the Mall of Monroe)

Format:

If there are enough ladies participating, we'll have one final playoff round with the Top 4 seeds. The highest seed will have their choice between game and/or order.


A custom LED trophy will be awarded every week to the Grand Champion!

tournaments.tournament_name: Belles & Chimes - Madison - Aftershock Classic Arc
tournaments.details: $5 Entry fee. Registration begins at 6pm. Group play begins at 6:30 PM. Each player will play through 6 pinball machines available in a random group of three or four depending on the head count using a software called MatchPlay and scores will be tabulated. After Points are totaled, a ranked list is generated and playoff groups will be formed. Ranked groups of four will play off in a Three Game Playoff on a single machine with the lowest scoring player being eliminated each game, arriving at one winner in each group. Homemade trophies will be for the top 4 winners of the night. https://www.bellesmadcity.com/ https://www.facebook.com/BellesMadCity/ https://www.instagram.com/bellesmadcity/

tournaments.details:
THURSDAY LADIES LIGHT UP THE LOUNGE @ THE PINBALL LOUNGE

Entry Fee:
* $5, plus your nightly coin drop ( 6 games are played)
* $4 will go towards the winner's pot each week
* $1 will go towards IFPA

Format:
* Players will be arranged by blind draw and will consist of 3 to 4 players matchups
* 6 games will be played, chosen randomly

Scoring:
* Groups of Four ( 3 - 2 - 1 - 0 )
* Groups of Three ( 3 - 1.5 - 0 )
* Overall points earned determine place

* Cash will be paid out at the end of the night for 1st thru 3rd place
* No set amount of winnings as it is based on that night's attendance

tournaments.raw_address: 13226 Tesson Ferry Rd, St. Louis, Missouri
tournaments.details:
KING KONG Women’s Launch Party at Murphy’s on 21

Date: July 11, 2025 

Doors Open at 5:00pm
Registration Starts at 6:00pm
Tournament Starts at 7:00pm


Location: Murphy’s on 21 at 13226 Tesson Ferry Rd, St. Louis, Missouri

Full bar will be open. All Ages event.  All skill levels welcomed


Entry Fee: $5 (with $1 going to the IFPA fee per person and rest to payout. There is coin drop ($0.75) for each game.


Qualifying: Stern’s King Kong pinball machine will be a preferred arena for every round. 3 Strikes tournament. Once a player has received three strikes they are out of the tournament. In a four player group bottom two players take a strike, in a three player group only the third place player will take a strike. In a two player group, second place will take 2 strikes. 
1st place will receive the exclusive King Kong Women’s Launch Party Plaque provided by Stern. Additional cash prizes to be awarded (leftover pot after expenses).

tournaments.tournament_name: Space City Pinball: Belles and Chimes
tournaments.details:
Join Belles & Chimes Houston at our monthly women's only pinball tournament! This month we will be at the LOWer Level Arcade, a private collection at the home of one of our Belles.

We welcome women of all ages and skills. If you've never played pinball before, don't worry. We are a fun and welcoming group!

All ladies will play 10 games in this matchplay tournament, and the top players will compete in a PAPA finals round of 3 games.

This is an IFPA event, and all players will earn WPPR points towards their women's ranking.

The tournament is $1.

Practice at 2pm. Tournament at 3pm.

Please review the Belles etiquette expectations listed on our website as they vary from the open Space City tournaments.  https://www.spacecitypinball.com/bellesandchimes/


Details about our league and tournament rules can also be found on our website. Space City Pinball hosts tournaments throughout the Houston area. Check out the SCPL website calendar to find out what events fit your schedule. We'd love to have you join us at an upcoming open or women's tournament soon!

Albuquerque Belles and Chimes Matchplay Tournament

Women's ranking system tournament with matchplay qualifying followed by amazing race finals.

Finals cutline dependent on number of participants.

Registration 11:30am
Start 12:30pm

$5 Entry Fee + coin drop

tournaments.tournament_name: ICT Ball Busters July Summer Jam
tournaments.raw_address: 906 E Third St N  Wichita, KS 67202
tournaments.details:
Beat the heat and join us for some pinball!

This is a women’s only event. ALL ages and skill levels are welcome! Bring your sister, your momma, girlfriends, your granny… any woman in your life that deserves to have a flippin’ good time!!

Doors open at 11am, the event starts at 1pm! Feel free to come in early, grab some food, and play some games!

There is a $5 entry fee, plus coin drop.

The format will be a Target Matchplay, using swiss pairing. The target is 20 points. Each round will be groups of 4 (or 3) playing 1 game, using Pinburgh (3,2,1,0) scoring. After the target is reached, the top 50% (or less, depending on number of players) will move onto a Best of Three, Head-to-Head Elimination. Top seed in the group will be allowed to choose game AND position in the first match. Each subsequent match, the lowest finisher from the previous game will be allowed to choose the game OR position. Each player may only choose a specific game one time for the entire Finals tournament. A group may not play the same game more than one time in a round.

**Ladies, join our FB group ICT Ball Busters for exciting Wichita women’s pinball events!!

All games are 2 tokens to play.
All extra balls will be off. If you are awarded an extra ball, please plunge it with no flips.
All rulings from Tournament Directors are final.
This is an IFPA Sanctioned event.

Thank you for continued your support of ICT Ball Busters and The Arcade!
